title: Nursery Rhyme. DI. Natural History.
content:
Little Poll Parrot
            Sat in his garret,
        Eating toast and tea;
            A little brown mouse,
            Jumped into the house,
        And stole it all away.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DI. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
